claims.text: Kimi K3 topped LMArena's Frontend Code leaderboard the same day at 1679 points — on just 1,757 votes, the fewest of any top-10 model, tagged "Preliminary."
Top-10 Frontend Code Arena rank-list table (kimi-k3 1679/1757 through claude-sonnet-5-high 1542/2959)
Kimi K3 carries 2.8 trillion total parameters, routed through a "Stable LatentMoE" mixture-of-experts framework that activates just 16 of 896 experts per token

Moonshot shipped a 1,048,576-token context window and published API pricing of $0.30/MTok cache-hit input, $3.00/MTok cache-miss input, and $15.00/MTok output; weights + technical report targeted July 27, 2026

Alibaba led a $2.5 billion mark in February 2024... $4.3B in December 2025, then a $2B round led by Meituan's Long-Z unit that valued the company at $20B in May 2026 — a roughly sixfold jump in six months

Trackers cluster the current execution-graded leaders at Claude Fable 5 (95.0% SWE-bench Verified), GPT-5.5 (~88.7%), Claude Opus 4.8 (88.6%), Gemini 3.1 Pro (80.6%); DeepSeek V4 leads open-weight at 80.6%/93.5%; GLM-5.2 posts 62.1% SWE-bench Pro
Kimi App's monthly active users are estimated to have peaked near 21.7M in Q1 2025 and fallen to roughly 9.0M by Q4 2025 — a decline of about 57%
An undisclosed 'experimental' Llama 4 Maverick variant scored ELO 1417 and was claimed #2, while the actual public Llama-4-Maverick-17B-128E-Instruct checkpoint tested at #32

The 'Leaderboard Illusion' paper found Meta tested 27 private variants pre-launch, and quantified Google/OpenAI each receiving ~19.2%/~20.4% of test volume vs ~29.7% for 83 open models combined, with gains up to 112%

Peer-reviewed research showed identifying which anonymous response came from which source model with over 95% accuracy using roughly 1,000 adversarial votes, demonstrated in a simulated, offline replica of the arena's voting pipeline

On January 13, 2026, US export-control policy shifted to allow case-by-case licensing of Nvidia H200 and AMD MI325X chips to China, capped at 50% of the aggregate compute shipped to equivalent US customers

Zhipu has said GLM-5.2 trained on roughly 100,000 Huawei Ascend 910B chips with no Nvidia hardware in the mix, and DeepSeek has gone further, validating V4 on both Nvidia GPU and Huawei Ascend NPU platforms

SemiAnalysis disputed DeepSeek's earlier claimed ~$5.6M single-run figure and instead estimated cumulative GPU spend at well over $500 million and total infrastructure capex around $1.6 billion across roughly 50,000 Nvidia Hopper-generation GPUs

Anthropic publicly accused Moonshot, DeepSeek, and MiniMax of running a coordinated distillation campaign against Claude, using roughly 24,000 fraudulent accounts to generate over 16 million exchanges, with Moonshot alone attributed more than 3.4 million of them

on Artificial Analysis's composite Intelligence Index, Kimi K2.7 Code scored 42 — a regression from predecessor K2.6's 44 — while GLM-5.2 led open-weight models at 51 and Claude Opus 4.8 led overall at roughly 56
Moonshot AI (月之暗面) was founded in March 2023 by three Tsinghua schoolmates — Yang Zhilin, Zhou Xinyu, and Wu Yuxin — and is headquartered in Beijing
Independent AI commentator 'kimmonismus' framed the Frontend Code Arena showing as a potential 'DeepSeek 2.0 moment'

on Scale AI's standardized SWE-bench Pro leaderboard, which locks every model to an identical scaffold, vendor-reported open-weight coding scores have run 10 to 30 points higher than the standardized result — the top open-weight entry, Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B, manages only 38.7%
Arena.ai's own changelog states only that Kimi K3 was 'added to' both Text Arena and Code Arena, with no stated rank or score on the general Text Arena board

the benchmark tracker BenchLM.ai excluded [K3] from its composite leaderboard entirely... only 34 of 52 published sub-scores were classified 'verified', the rest 'provisional', and coverage spanned just 5 of 8 tracked categories
the company has not published an active-parameter figure for the model — third-party estimates cluster between 40B and 128B, none confirmed
press reporting around the 2026 rounds attributes investor enthusiasm in part to API/ARR growth that reportedly continued expanding even as the consumer app shrank
an LMArena-style aesthetic-preference win is being read by much of the coverage as a capability claim
Kimi K2.6 to #1 in one model generation is a large single-step move on a leaderboard that typically shifts by a handful of places release-over-release
